name: person_alert
comment: Person-gated record + RICH notify. Cascade: camera -> motion-gated YOLO (decode_detect, class_filter=[0]=person only). A person detection event fans out to: store (mode=event, pre/post-roll clip), describe_vlm (VLM describes the frame, triggered by the detection), and output_mqtt. output_mqtt publishes the bare detection to zm-next/detection AND the VLM description+detection (a single rich alert: text + label/bbox/confidence) to zm-next/description. Needs an MQTT broker (`mosquitto -p 1883`) and a local VLM server (bench/metal/run_mlx_vlm_server.sh). Fill in camera URL, model_path, and the VLM model id; on Apple decode_detect auto-selects Metal/ANE. Watch: mosquitto_sub -t 'zm-next/#' -v

cfg.prompt: Describe this security-camera scene in one short sentence; focus on the person and what they are doing.
